description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base and a prominent white label featuring text and symbols. The extinguisher has a red handle and lever mechanism at the top, along with a black flexible hose attached near the valve. The hose curves downward and is secured to the body, designed for directing the extinguishing agent. The label on the front provides usage instructions, capacity information, and safety symbols, all printed in white and yellow. The overall surface is smooth and glossy, with the brand name 'ONVANZ' displayed vertically in large white letters. The extinguisher is typical of those found in urban environments such as garages, public buildings, and sidewalks.
description: A red, glossy fire extinguisher with a black base, white instructional label, and a black hose attached to the top. The body features prominent white branding and safety markings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the white label with instructions, the red handle, and the black hose attached to the top and curving downward.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the cylindrical shape, the vertical white branding, and the length of the black hose.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the extinguisher, the black base, and the hose attachment point, with less visible labeling.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the curvature of the hose and the red handle, with partial visibility of the label and branding.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large white label with text, symbols, and branding is present on the front of the cylinder, covering a significant portion of the surface.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black flexible hose is attached near the top, curving downward along the side; the nozzle is at the end of the hose.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A red safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
